[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001011 4
1 00000000 a
2 00000001 1
3 11011100 5
4 10000011 3
5 01011011 5
6 01000100 2
7 00010010 2

01 10 11000001 3
12 21 01010000 2
23 32 11011001 5
34 43 11000010 3
45 54 00011011 4
56 65 11011000 4
67 76 00011111 5
70 07 01010110 4

02 20 10010001 3
13 31 10001001 3
24 42 00011011 4
35 53 11011001 5
46 64 11000011 4
57 75 11000111 5
60 06 01001001 3
71 17 10010111 5

03 30 01001000 2
14 41 01001011 4 match 0
25 52 00000000 a match 1
36 63 00000001 1 match 2
47 74 11011100 5 match 3
50 05 10010001 3
61 16 10001000 2
72 27 11000111 5

04 40 10001010 3
15 51 01010000 2
26 62 11011000 4
37 73 00011110 4
